query: Yes, please go ahead and list the payment methods I currently have saved in my profile. That way, I can choose one for the charges.

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: The user wants to cancel reservations IFOYYZ and NQNU5R and upgrade M20IZO to business class.
assistant: The assistant retrieves the reservation details and explains that NQNU5R is refundable, IFOYYZ can still be canceled without refund, and M20IZO can be upgraded.
user: The user confirms all three actions and asks to use the credit card ending in 7334 for charges.
assistant: The assistant confirms the requested actions again and asks for final confirmation.
user: The user confirms.
tool: Reservations IFOYYZ and NQNU5R are canceled.
assistant: The assistant says it will proceed with upgrading M20IZO and retrieves the reservation details again.
assistant: The assistant asks for confirmation to upgrade M20IZO with the credit card ending in 7334.
user: The user confirms the upgrade.
tool: The upgrade attempt fails because the payment method is not found.
assistant: The assistant explains that the named card is not found in the profile and says it can only use payment methods already saved on the user's profile. It offers to list the saved payment methods.
user: The user asks the assistant to list the payment methods currently saved in the profile.

candidate_answers.text: Sure — I’ll check the payment methods saved on your profile so you can choose one for the upgrade charges.
The user is explicitly asking what payment methods are saved after a payment-method-not-found error, so retrieving the user profile is the most direct grounded next action.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Use the payment-method-discovery turn because the user explicitly asks to see saved payment methods after a failed payment attempt, which directly calls for profile retrieval.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user's request using only visible conversation evidence.
notes: query comes directly from the selected user message
history_summary stops before the later user-profile tool result and before the successful upgrade retry
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
the cancellations are already complete by this point; only payment disambiguation for the upgrade remains
